strategy: He heals 500 (Sap Health from a Mander) whenever a wizard deals 300+ direct damage. Use DoT spells, which do not trigger the cheat, or just burst through it since he is only 2560 health.
Do not place Traps on him; a trap triggers a Weakness on you. Set up with blades instead.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+6% incoming); avoid Balance (50% resist).
He summons a Conscripted Mander at the end of round 1 and another at the end of round 2. AoE to catch them, or kill his Manders to deny the Sap heal.
cheatNotes: He summons a Conscripted Mander at the end of round 1.
He summons a second Mander at the end of round 2.
Dealing 300+ direct damage makes him Sap a Mander for 500 health and resummon it. Use DoTs or just burst through it.
DoT spells do not trigger the Sap heal, the clean way to damage him.
The cheat still fires with no minions up, but the 500 heal fails, so killing his Manders first denies the heal.
Placing a Trap on him triggers a Weakness on you. Set up with blades, not traps.
